rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HANS HERBERT BARTSCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Use Settled Statement
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Norman Herterich's ("Petitioner") Motion to Use Settled Statement is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. Petitioner may file his Proposed Settled Statement in Department 204, triggering the timelines set forth in CRC, Rule 8.137, but, to the extent a hearing is required, the parties must coordinate that date with the clerk in Department 304. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling must so notify the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and other parties no later than 4 p.m. on Tuesday, October 23, 2018.
